The curtains rise on the first race of the Classic Triple 
Crown, the Satsuki Sho.

Eighteen of the finest racers are ready to win. But which of 
them will achieve glory today?

The 2 000-meter race to the finish will start any second… 
And they're off!

Urged on by the cheers from the stands, the runners are 
battling it out for a spot in the front pack!
Any one of them could take the lead!

The runners are entering the backstretch without any signs 
of slowing down.

The pace is relatively — no, extremely fast for the Satsuki 
Sho!
But the front pack isn't losing any steam!

Will they be able to keep up the high pace? We're looking 
at one big finish coming up!

The end is approaching, and the racers in the rear are 
closing the gap!

The front's lead is almost gone! Are they about to pay for 
that sprint in the beginning?!
Hold on! A lone racer has broken out ahead!

What momentum! The pace is fast, but she's faster! Look at 
the power in those strides!

Narita, Narita, Narita! It's Narita Brian! Narita Brian is 
gaining a huge lead!

We knew she was strong, but WOW! Congrats, Narita 
Brian!
